name: openai_api_key Doctor check consults secret_provider before env var
description: Bug B5 regression guard. Verifies that openaiApiKey.js Doctor check consults secret_provider.get() first (keychain) before falling back to process.env.OPENAI_API_KEY. Uses Module._load mock to inject a fake secret_provider. Authority: stage_12_7_amended_mid.md §20 (Bug B5).
